{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Kazan strongholds
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] plans to retreat into underground strongholds.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|We had planned to retreat into our strongholds and withstand the coming storm. “These strongholds. They’re underground, aren’t they?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
